title: Annual Craft & Creative Arts Festival
description: Celebrating creative skills of our special students through block paintings and hand-knit models.

title: Launch of Sensory Integration Room
description: New safe bubble-tube and sound-dampened sensory play setup deployed with Rotary support.

title: Special Children Sports Meet
description: Assisted and independent race runs to build posture coordination and joy.

title: Pediatric Health & Dental Checkup
description: Annual free dental screening and hygiene kits distributed to school children.
